tool_calls.name: execute_lisp

{"code":"(def open-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"}))
(let [total-open (count open-prs)
      grouped-by-repo (group-by :repo open-prs)
      repo-counts (into {} (for [[repo prs] grouped-by-repo] [repo (count prs)]))
      max-repo (apply max-key val repo-counts)]
  {:total-open-prs total-open
   :repository-with-most (key max-repo)
   :count-in-that-repo (val max-repo)
